allow: Bash(timeout 180 bash -c 'until curl -s https://med-systemapi-production.up.railway.app/health 2>&1 | grep -q "status.*ok"; do echo "[$\(date +%H:%M:%S\)] Aguardando..."; sleep 5; done; echo ""; echo "✅✅✅ API FINALMENTE ONLINE!"; echo ""; curl -s https://med-systemapi-production.up.railway.app/health')

Bash(timeout 300 bash -c 'for i in {1..60}; do result=$\(curl -s https://med-systemapi-production.up.railway.app/health 2>&1\); if echo "$result" | grep -q "status.*ok"; then echo "✅ API ONLINE!"; echo "$result"; echo ""; echo "POST /auth/register test:"; curl -s -X POST https://med-systemapi-production.up.railway.app/auth/register -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"email\\":\\"test@test.com\\",\\"password\\":\\"123456\\",\\"name\\":\\"Test\\",\\"clinicId\\":\\"c1\\"}"; break; else echo "[$i/60] Status: $\(echo "$result" | grep -o "error\\|ok" || echo "building..."\)"; sleep 5; fi; done')

Bash(timeout 300 bash -c 'until curl -s https://med-systemapi-production.up.railway.app/health 2>&1 | grep -q "status.*ok"; do echo "[$\(date +%H:%M:%S\)] Aguardando..."; sleep 6; done; echo ""; echo "✅✅✅ API ONLINE!"; echo ""; curl -s https://med-systemapi-production.up.railway.app/health; echo ""; echo "POST /auth/register:"; curl -s -X POST https://med-systemapi-production.up.railway.app/auth/register -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"email\\":\\"doctor@clinic.com\\",\\"password\\":\\"pass123\\",\\"name\\":\\"Dr Silva\\",\\"clinicId\\":\\"clinic-1\\"}"')
Bash(timeout 60 bash -c 'for i in {1..12}; do echo "Tentativa $i..."; curl -s https://med-systemapi-production.up.railway.app/health 2>&1 | head -c 100; echo ""; sleep 5; done')

Bash(timeout 120 bash -c 'for i in {1..20}; do echo "[$i/20] Testando..."; result=$\(curl -s https://med-systemapi-production.up.railway.app/health 2>&1\); if echo "$result" | grep -q "status"; then if echo "$result" | grep -q "ok"; then echo "✅ FUNCIONOU!"; echo "$result"; break; else echo "❌ 502 ainda"; fi; fi; sleep 3; done')
Bash(timeout 120 bash -c 'for i in {1..24}; do echo "[$i/24] Aguardando rebuild..."; curl -s https://med-systemapi-production.up.railway.app/health 2>&1 | head -c 80; echo ""; sleep 5; done')

Bash(timeout 120 bash -c 'for i in {1..24}; do result=$\(curl -s https://med-systemapi-production.up.railway.app/health 2>&1\); if echo "$result" | grep -q "ok"; then echo "✅✅✅ FUNCIONOU!"; echo "$result"; break; else echo "[$i/24] 502 ainda"; fi; sleep 5; done')
